title: micromelum minutum var. ceylanicum
intro: Micromelum minutum var. ceylanicum, also known as Ceylonese or Ceylon milk fruit, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is used in traditional medicine and has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb for various health benefits. The plant is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, and is also used to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Micromelum minutum var. ceylanicum is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
